title: Theo's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Theo plays peek-a-boo with his favorite bedtime friends as he gets ready for sleep, discovering who's hiding behind blankets, curtains, and pillows in this interactive bedtime adventure.

pages.text: Theo is getting ready for bed. Where are his sleepy friends hiding? Let's play peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes stands in a cozy bedroom with partially hidden objects behind curtains and blankets, creating a playful peek-a-boo composition with lift the flap inspired elements
illustration.alt: Theo in bedroom ready to play peek-a-boo

pages.text: Who's behind the blue curtain? Peek-a-boo! It's Teddy Bear! Teddy says goodnight to Theo.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes pulling back a blue curtain to reveal a brown teddy bear, with playful concealment and surprise element in lift the flap inspired style
illustration.alt: Theo finding teddy bear behind curtain

pages.text: What's under the soft blanket? Peek-a-boo! It's Bunny! Bunny wants to snuggle with Theo.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lifting a soft pink blanket to discover a white bunny underneath, showing hiding and revealing with interactive feel in peek-a-boo composition

pages.text: Who's hiding behind the pillow? Peek-a-boo! It's sleepy Moon! Moon smiles at Theo. Time for sweet dreams!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes moving a fluffy pillow to reveal a smiling crescent moon, with behind the curtain style and partially hidden objects creating a bedtime peek-a-boo scene

pages.text: Goodnight, Theo! All your friends are here. Close your eyes and sleep tight. Sweet dreams!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lying in bed surrounded by teddy bear, bunny, and moon, with lift the flap inspired gentle lighting and playful concealment of stars peeking through window
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping peacefully with all his friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: What did Theo find behind the blue curtain?
questions.explanation: Theo found Teddy Bear hiding behind the blue curtain!

questions.question: Where was Bunny hiding?
questions.explanation: Bunny was hiding under the soft blanket!

questions.question: Who was behind the pillow?
questions.explanation: The sleepy Moon was hiding behind the pillow!
